commitMessage:
feat(events): replace 'All' with 'Next' toggle on mobile and desktop; implement robust Next vs Past filtering and sorting

- UI: labels/aria updated to Next/Past across FigmaMobile and FigmaDesktop
- Logic: Next shows only future events (> now), Past shows only past (< now)
- Sorting: Next ascending (soonest first), Past descending (most recent first)
- Handle invalid/missing dates safely; preserve styling and responsiveness
